summary: Repaired the exact-main Woodpecker catalog drift that the rebase onto the latest origin/main exposed, reverified the repo-managed Woodpecker runtime and controller-local bootstrap path from committed source `cbc004fd0ae22cb6ed692430438ad5f31c24458b`, and carried ADR 0287 onto the `0.177.110 / 0.130.73` mainline closeout. The final post-push remote-main pipeline proof is appended in the follow-up mainline evidence update.

verification.observed: The first rebased exact-main replay dropped Woodpecker's controller-local secret manifest and several catalog entries during conflict resolution, which surfaced immediately in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0287-mainline-r2-live-apply-service-0.177.110.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0287-mainline-r4-targeted-checks-0.177.110.txt`. Commit `cbc004fd0ae22cb6ed692430438ad5f31c24458b` restored the missing Woodpecker catalog and controller-secret surfaces, refreshed the generated Uptime Kuma monitor catalog, and added the already-merged Directus roles to `config/ansible-role-idempotency.yml` so the exact-main validation lane matched the real repo tree again.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_postgres_vm_access_policy.py tests/test_woodpecker_playbook.py tests/test_woodpecker_runtime_role.py tests/test_woodpecker_client.py tests/test_woodpecker_tool.py tests/test_validate_service_catalog.py tests/test_validate_service_completeness.py tests/test_subdomain_catalog.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_workstream_surface_ownership.py tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py tests/test_ansible_role_idempotency.py tests/test_data_catalog.py tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py -q` returned `123 passed in 9.24s` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0287-mainline-r5-targeted-checks-0.177.110.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=woodpecker env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` succeeded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0287-mainline-r3-live-apply-service-0.177.110.txt` with final recaps `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=157 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=44 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=4 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=0 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=47 changed=6 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=51 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=277 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=140 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Public, private, and controller API proofs
verification.observed: `curl -fsSI https://ci.lv3.org/healthz` returned `HTTP/2 200` with `x-woodpecker-version: 3.13.0`, `curl -fsSI http://100.64.0.1:8017/healthz` returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK`, `openssl s_client -connect ci.lv3.org:443 -servername ci.lv3.org | openssl x509 -noout -subject -issuer -ext subjectAltName` reported `subject=CN=ci.lv3.org`, issuer `CN=E7`, and SAN `DNS:ci.lv3.org`, `make woodpecker-manage ACTION=whoami` resolved to admin `ops-gitea`, and `make woodpecker-manage ACTION=list-secrets WOODPECKER_ARGS='--repo ops/proxmox_florin_server'` confirmed the seeded `LV3_WOODPECKER_SECRET_SMOKE` repository secret.

`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `git diff --check`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces health-probes generated-docs data-models` all passed after the final generated-truth refresh, including the regenerated subdomain exposure registry, in the `r6` evidence bundle.

`make remote-validate` passed on the build-server validation lane with `agent-standards`, `workstream-surfaces`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `policy-validation`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph`, and `make pre-push-gate` passed the full primary-branch gate with `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `security-scan`, `semgrep-sast`, and `integration-tests` included in the same `r6` evidence set.

notes: The branch-local receipt remains the first-live audit trail for ADR 0287 on platform version 0.130.72.
The repaired exact-main replay advanced the tracked platform version to 0.130.73 because this is the canonical mainline closeout for ADR 0287.
The final post-push remote-main pipeline trigger proof is recorded by updating this canonical mainline receipt once `.woodpecker.yml` is visible on origin/main.

correction_loop.repair_action: Restored the Woodpecker controller-local secret manifest and missing exact-main catalog entries after the rebase dropped them, refreshed the generated Uptime Kuma monitor catalog, added the already-merged Directus roles to the idempotency policy, and reran the exact-main validation and service replay lane from committed source cbc004fd0ae22cb6ed692430438ad5f31c24458b.
correction_loop.verification: The repaired exact-main candidate passed the focused Woodpecker pytest slice, passed syntax-check-woodpecker, passed the authoritative live-apply-service replay, and reverified the public edge, private controller path, whoami identity, and seeded smoke secret.
